parameters.name: threshold
parameters.label: Release = Trigger Threshold
parameters.description: If on, the trigger and release thresholds are the same value.

parameters.name: threshup
parameters.label: Trigger Threshold
parameters.description: The trigger threshold (see above).

parameters.name: threshdown
parameters.label: Release Threshold
parameters.description: The release threshold (see above).

parameters.name: retrigger
parameters.label: Re-Trigger Delay
parameters.description: The amount of time after a trigger point that a new trigger may occur.

parameters.name: mintrigger
parameters.label: Min Trigger Length
parameters.description: The minimum amount of time that the trigger will remain active.

parameters.name: triggeron
parameters.label: Trigger On
parameters.description: Determines whether a trigger occurs on an increasing slope or decreasing slope when passing the trigger threshold. A release will occur on the opposite slope.

parameters.name: multitrigger
parameters.label: Multi Trigger
parameters.description: When triggering mulitple envelopes, add their values together.

parameters.name: clamppeak
parameters.label: Clamp at Peak Level
parameters.description: Clamp the additive effect of Multi-Triggers Additive at the level set in Peak Level parameter.

parameters.name: complete
parameters.label: Complete Envelope
parameters.description: If on, a complete envelope is produced for each trigger point. If off, the envelope may be terminated at any time by a release point.

parameters.name: remainder
parameters.label: Remainder
parameters.description: See Remainder Options. What to do with remaining samples at end of the interval:

parameters.name: trigger
parameters.label: Trigger
parameters.description: Instantly trigger an envelope (regardless of input).

parameters.name: delay
parameters.label: Delay Length
parameters.description: The amount of time to delay the envelope after the trigger point.

parameters.name: attack
parameters.label: Attack Length
parameters.description: The amount of rise time from zero to the peak level.

parameters.name: ashape
parameters.label: Attack Shape
parameters.description: The shape of the attack ramp.

parameters.name: peak
parameters.label: Peak Level
parameters.description: The peak level it will rise to in the attack phase.

parameters.name: peaklen
parameters.label: Peak Length
parameters.description: The length of time of the peak is held before going into the decay phase.

parameters.name: decay
parameters.label: Decay Length
parameters.description: The amount of decay time from the peak level to the sustain level.

parameters.name: dshape
parameters.label: Decay Shape
parameters.description: The shape of the decay ramp.

parameters.name: sustain
parameters.label: Sustain Level
parameters.description: The sustain level. This level is held until a release point is reached (the input goes below the threshold).

parameters.name: minsustain
parameters.label: Min Sustain Length
parameters.description: Set a minimum amount of time for sustain. When set to 0, sustain is simply held for as long as the input is held, but when setting a minimum time here the evelope will always include a sustain for the

parameters.name: release
parameters.label: Release Length
parameters.description: The amount of release time from the sustain level to zero.

parameters.name: rshape
parameters.label: Release Shape
parameters.description: The shape of the release ramp.

parameters.name: channame
parameters.label: Channel Name
parameters.description: Name of channels output.

parameters.name: specifyrate
parameters.label: Specify Rate
parameters.description: Allows you to specify the sample rate in the parameter below.

parameters.name: enableremaplength
parameters.label: Enable Remap Length
parameters.description: Enables remapping of the total envelope to a specific length. Note that ‘held sustain’ length is not remapped, only Delay, Attack, Peak, and Release lengths are remapped.

parameters.name: remaplength
parameters.label: Remap Length
parameters.description: Sets the total envelope remapped length.

parameters.name: rate
parameters.label: Sample Rate
parameters.description: Sets the sample rate of the output. Only used when is turned on.

parameters.name: timeslice
parameters.label: Time Slice
parameters.description: Turning this on forces the channels to be " ".  A is the time between the last cook frame and the current cook frame.

parameters.name: scope
parameters.label: Scope
parameters.description: To determine which channels get affected, some CHOPs use a string on the Common page. See .

parameters.name: srselect
parameters.label: Sample Rate Match
parameters.description: Handle cases where multiple input CHOPs' sample rates are different. When Resampling occurs, the curves are interpolated according to the Interpolation Method Option, or "Linear" if the Interpolate Op

parameters.name: exportmethod
parameters.label: Export Method
parameters.description: This will determine how to connect the channel to the parameter. Refer to the article for more information.

parameters.name: autoexportroot
parameters.label: Export Root
parameters.description: This path points to the root node where all of the paths that exporting by are relative to.

parameters.name: exporttable
parameters.label: Export Table
parameters.description: The used to hold the export information when using the Table Methods (See above).

parameters.name: releaseunit
parameters.label: Releaseunit
parameters.description: Help Not Available.

parameters.name: retriggerunit
parameters.label: Retriggerunit
parameters.description: Help Not Available.

parameters.name: decayunit
parameters.label: Decayunit
parameters.description: Help Not Available.

parameters.name: remaplengthunit
parameters.label: Remaplengthunit
parameters.description: Help Not Available.

parameters.name: mintriggerunit
parameters.label: Mintriggerunit
parameters.description: Help Not Available.

parameters.name: attackunit
parameters.label: Attackunit
parameters.description: Help Not Available.

parameters.name: peaklenunit
parameters.label: Peaklenunit
parameters.description: Help Not Available.

parameters.name: minsustainunit
parameters.label: Minsustainunit
parameters.description: Help Not Available.

parameters.name: delayunit
parameters.label: Delayunit
parameters.description: Help Not Available.
